title: mangifera foetida
intro: Mangifera foetida, also known as the honge tree or yellow mangifera, is a plant species in the family Anacardiaceae that is native to parts of Asia, including India and Sri Lanka. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues, due to its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Mangifera foetida include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestive health, and boost the immune system. Various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and decoctions, have been made from the plant's leaves, bark, and fruits, which are rich in vitamins, minerals, and antioxidants.
